extension.summary: Sync Kodi playback with a friend~ no Hamachi needed
extension.description: NuiSync lets you watch together in perfect harmony! Host or join a cozy watch session to sync play, pause, seek, and stop between two Kodi instances. Share a short session code — no Hamachi, no port forwarding needed. Connects via a lightweight cloud relay that works through any NAT or firewall. Falls back to direct IP for LAN. Pure Python, no extra dependencies~ Works beautifully with Fen Light, Cocoscrapers, and TorBox.
